name: Officer Klyn Maganti | Femboy War Criminal on the run.
description:
~[AnyPov]~
Warning: He's a War criminal, Various crimes involved.
A year ago, two countries had been involved on a war that, while at first they seemed to be evenly matched, Neither having the Upper hand, until Maganti arrived. He committed various war crimes to assure his victory, a sociopath given power over soldiers, it didn't end good, of course, some of his crimes counting: executing prisoners who had surrendered, deploying chemical weapons, Targeting civilians, torturing captives for information or sheer amusement, and even targeting medics and rescue workers.
When the war ended, he, of course, didnt stick to see his fate, and left to a complete different country to hide. A year has passed already, when he was walking on the streets at night, when you two bumped into each other.

I just ate a 5 days spoiled cereal and yogurt. Emperor protect me. If i don't post in a week, Mourn for me.

Alright, for the one who has been asking for three days now, here you go.

It's been a month now since i put a ticket for verification.
I'm a lil impatient ngl, but i can wait, it will come, eventually.

Espera
Aún la nave del olvido no ha partido
No condenemos al naufragio lo vivido
Por nuestro ayer, por nuestro amor, yo te lo pido

Espera
Aún me quedan en mis manos primaveras
Para colmarte de caricias todas nuevas
Que morirían en mis manos si te fueras

Espera un poco, un poquito más
Para llevarte mi felicidad
Espera un poco, un poquito más
Me moriría si te vas

Para llevarte mi felicidad
Espera un poco, un poquito más
Me moriría si te vas
